name: paperflow
description: Turn academic PDFs into a connected Obsidian knowledge atlas, then weave vault evidence into transparent linear arguments.

interface.shortDescription: From connected papers to coherent arguments
interface.longDescription: PaperFlow bundles Atlas for durable PDF archiving and networked literature notes with Thread for evidence-traceable, user-guided linear synthesis inside Obsidian.
defaultPrompt: Use PaperFlow Atlas to archive and connect this paper in my Obsidian vault.
Use PaperFlow Thread to trace this research question through my existing vault.
